SEARCH
Package net.sf.jailer.database

Klasse Session.AbstractResultSetReader

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jailer.database.Session.AbstractResultSetReader
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Session.ResultSetReader
Bekannte direkte Unterklassen:
DeletionTransformer, DMLTransformer, FlatXMLTransformer, LiquibaseXMLTransformer, UpdateTransformer, XmlExportTransformer
Umschließende Klasse:
Session
public abstract static class Session.AbstractResultSetReader extends Object implements Session.ResultSetReader
Reads a JDBC-result-set. Caches a ResultSetMetaData.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • AbstractResultSetReader

      public AbstractResultSetReader()

  • Methodendetails

    • getMetaData

      protected ResultSetMetaData getMetaData(ResultSet resultSet) throws SQLException
      Gets and caches the meta data of a result set.
      Parameter:
      resultSet - the result set
      Gibt zurück:
      meta data of the result set
      Löst aus:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs

    • getCellContentConverter

      protected CellContentConverter getCellContentConverter(ResultSet resultSet, Session session, DBMS targetDBMSConfiguration) throws SQLException
      Gets and caches the CellContentConverter for the result set.
      Parameter:
      resultSet - the result set
      session - the current session
      targetDBMSConfiguration - configuration of the target DBMS
      Gibt zurück:
      the CellContentConverter for the result set
      Löst aus:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs

    • close

      public void close() throws SQLException
      Does nothing.
      Angegeben von:
      close in Schnittstelle Session.ResultSetReader
      Löst aus:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs

    • init

      public void init(ResultSet resultSet) throws SQLException
      Initializes the reader.
      Parameter:
      resultSet - the result set to read
      Löst aus:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs
